form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Mister Freeman at this track over 1780m in a MAIDEN on March 25 at $7. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after showing early speed, behind Heza Dirty Dancer at this track over 1780m in a MAIDEN on April 8 at $18. Nicely drawn and expected to run a bold race again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Mister Freeman at this track over 1780m in a MAIDEN on March 25 at $7. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after showing early speed, behind Heza Dirty Dancer at this track over 1780m in a MAIDEN on April 8 at $18. Nicely drawn and expected to run a bold race again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to hang out throughout the run and raced greenly.
Shifted inwards and contacted marker pegs rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 12 m by Bettor Be Bodhi (2:21.10) in 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $9. Before that, a good run when 3rd (Fr4) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 4.5 m by Oneandonly (2:20.00) in No NR on March 23 at $19. Sure to improve on the latest effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Obtained an inside run from Perfect Lou when it hung out.
Broke free of interference around the 350m.
Hung out near the 400m briefly before being corrected by its driver.
Galloped at the start taking no competitive part in the race.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr1) over 1780m after showing early pace at this track beaten 8 m by Magic Jujon (2:12.80) in 3yo+ No NR on April 2 at $81. At the start before 4th (Fr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 19 m by Mister Freeman (2:11.50) in MAIDEN on March 25 at $34. Heading the right way and should play a big role.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 9 m by Bettor Be Bodhi (2:21.10) in 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $126. Two runs back 4th (Sr1) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 19 m by Oneandonly (2:20.00) in No NR on March 23 at $61. Has the task ahead.

form.formComment: Well-beaten 28 days ago at Marburg over 1850m, and two back was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 1780m after being wide early at this track, beaten 40 m by Captain Blue Chip (2:16.10) in MAIDEN on March 8 at $18. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages.
Surrendered the lead over the early stages of the event.
Hung out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track, beaten 35 m by Heza Dirty Dancer (2:10.40) in MAIDEN on April 8 at $81. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr6) over 1780m after being wide early at this track, beaten 15 m by Jukebox Jet (2:13.80) in 3yo+ NR up to 39 on April 1 at $81. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and contacted a marker peg around the 1850m.
Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten more than 68m.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track, beaten 35 m by Dont Ask Again (2:11.50) in MAIDEN on April 1 at $101. At his previous start 5th (Sr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 45 m by Mister Freeman (2:11.50) in MAIDEN on March 25 at $31. Can make amends.

Better than last start and worth another chance.
